entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0091.9376] The element us-gaap:BusinessCombinationStepAcquisitionEquityInterestInAcquireePercentage with a value of 35 has a value greater than a 1,000 percent. Percentage items should have a value that are generally between 0 and 1. In XBRL a value of 1 is equal to 100%. Please review the value of the element to ensure that it is scaled correctly. For example 200 basis points should be reported as 0.02.
Period :2023-05-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:BusinessAcquisitionAxis=SWRD:HoneycombSubFundShaunMember Unit : pure Decimals: inf
Rule Element Id:9376 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - favo_s1a2.htm 24217

property.name: label
property.value: Business Combination, Achieved in Stages, Preacquisition Equity Interest in Acquiree, Percentage

property.name: unitRef
property.value: Pure (pure)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0091.9376] The element us-gaap:BusinessCombinationStepAcquisitionEquityInterestInAcquireePercentage with a value of 65 has a value greater than a 1,000 percent. Percentage items should have a value that are generally between 0 and 1. In XBRL a value of 1 is equal to 100%. Please review the value of the element to ensure that it is scaled correctly. For example 200 basis points should be reported as 0.02.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0091.9376] The element us-gaap:AvailableforsaleSecuritiesInUnrealizedLossPositionsQualitativeDisclosureOtherFairValueVolatilityRate with a value of 75 has a value greater than a 1,000 percent. Percentage items should have a value that are generally between 0 and 1. In XBRL a value of 1 is equal to 100%. Please review the value of the element to ensure that it is scaled correctly. For example 200 basis points should be reported as 0.02.
